title: Nutty Dense Slovakian Nuts Stir-fry
description: A vegetarian-friendly stir-fry dish featuring nutty and dense elements like walnuts and cashews, enhanced with the savory taste of mirin, perfectly suited for a monsoon season.

ingredients.name: Seasoning Mix (salt, pepper, and garlic powder)

instructions: Mix walnut pieces, cashew pieces, mirin, seasoning mix in a bowl. Ensure all ingredients are coated evenly with the liquid mixture.
Place the seasoned mixture into the air fryer basket and air-fry for about 5-7 minutes or until lightly golden brown and crispy.
Transfer to a serving plate and serve immediately.
